default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and SEO efforts to increase visibility and drive relevant traffic for Firework's video commerce products and services.](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus content on solving problems and addressing needs of target customer personas (ICPs), rather than just promoting Firework's products](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Leverage trends and popular search terms to attract relevant traffic, even if not directly related to Firework's core offerings](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Provide more context around Firework's different product lines (short videos, showrooms, 1-on-1 video shopping) to inspire better content](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Share data on companies/industries visiting specific pages to guide content prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Align on metrics to measure content success beyond just traffic (e.g. quality leads, conversions)](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Prioritize creating content that attracts and engages the right ICPs by addressing their needs/problems](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Leverage trending topics and popular search terms as entry points, even if not core product terms](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Balance product-specific terms like "video commerce" with broader topics that drive commercial intent](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Firework's Product Portfolio

  - [Short video shopping experiences](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Digital showrooms and live streaming](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [1-on-1 video shopping (high AOV products like furniture, appliances)](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Offer "co-op services" providing strategy, content, operations support](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Measuring Content Success

  - [Impressions and clicks are initial metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Need to tie content performance to quality lead generation and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Share data on companies visiting specific content to prioritize topics](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Collaboration and Feedback Loop

  - [Firework to share product info, target accounts, and conversion metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze content performance data and optimize strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Leverage existing Firework materials (training, guides) as additional content](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Firework to share recording from product team sync on 1-on-1 video shopping and other offerings](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue publishing content, monitoring performance, and optimizing titles/topics](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Implement tool to capture company-level website visitor data and map to content](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Align on defining and measuring quality lead generation from content](https://fathom.video/share/nEXBHiZBjzkjj6Z9f58L_7AZzHLqCRqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

action_items.description: Provide additional product and visitor data to support Jimmy's content strategy
Prioritize the "video commerce" keyword and publish relevant content to maintain Firework's visibility for that keyword
Send Jimmy a recording of the go-to-market meeting after it concludes that morning
